license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qeidtce
title: Genotyping protocol for detection of polymorhisms at codons 146 (N/S/D), 211 (R/Q) and 222 (Q/K) in the caprine PRNP gene
author: Loukia Ekateriniadou

steps_raw.instruction: KAPA PROBE FAST qPCR Master Mix (2X): 6.25μl SNP Genotyping Assay Mix (primers and probes) (40X): 0.3125μl Genomic DNA: 1μl (50-80ng) H 2 O: 4.9375μl
Initial Denaturation Step: 95 o C - 3min 45 cycles Denaturation: 95 o C - 3sec Primer annealing/extension: 62 o C - 30sec
Genotypes were detected through amplification plots with QPCR Applied Biosystems Step One Software v2.3
